title: Tofu Vindaloo
description: A tangy and spicy Indian dish made with marinated tofu, typically served with rice or roti.

ingredients.name: Tofu
ingredients.notes: Extra-firm, drained and cut into bite-sized cubes

instructions: 1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add tofu and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
3. Add curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
4. Add stir-fry mix and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
5. Stir in coconut milk and tomato sauce. Bring to a simmer.
6. Reduce heat to low and let cook for 10-15 minutes.
7. Season with salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper to taste.
8. Serve hot over rice or with roti.
